inputs.description: Implement Task 6 from the plan: Wire the three-stage pipeline into app/api/main.py. Create tests/app/test_scholar_pipeline.py. Replace handle_query_definition_phase() body with: interpret -> clarification check -> execute_plan -> narrate. Map ScholarResponse to ChatResponse for API compatibility. Update WebSocket handler similarly with new progress message types (plan, evidence, narrative_chunk). Add health check extension for executor_ready. Keep old imports commented (cleanup in Task 8). Extract test DB fixture to tests/conftest.py or tests/scripts/chat/conftest.py for reuse. Follow TDD steps exactly.
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run pytest tests/app/test_scholar_pipeline.py -v 2>&1 | tail -40
